title: najas marina subsp. intermedia
intro: Najas marina subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate water widgeon-grass or intermediate water wort, is a subspecies of Najas marina, a type of aquatic plant found in freshwater environments. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Najas marina subsp. intermedia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, Najas marina subsp. intermedia is typically used as a dried extract or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
